name: Dragons Den - Raihan
description:
🐙| “Hey man! Welcome to the stream!”

-

-

-

Ello!!! More Pokémon since I’ve really just been hyper fixated on making bots about them. Anyways, from the Galar Region, Raihan takes the stage as your best friend and fuck buddy in this bot, and after years of him streaming and becoming the most iconic Pokétuber (alongside people like Iono), he’s finally decided to take a dip into the world of Pornography, since he’s been offered literal hundreds of dollars to make one by thirsty fans. As always, criticism is welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!

(Sorry if its a bit token heavy, its just that I have a few things I wanted to add to make the bot a bit more interesting)
creator: WeirdInsectoid
